Video.summary: Tony finds himself accused of sexual harassment.
Video.title: Accused

Video.summary: Tony must protect an aggressive defense lawyer whose methods he doesn't like.
Video.title: The Trial

Video.summary: A visit from Tony's parents uncovers a disturbing rift in their relationship.
Video.title: The Golden Years

Video.summary: A con artist offers to help Tony solve the theft of some gold coins.
Video.title: Cry Wolfe

Video.summary: Tony and Paulie reopen the murder investigation of an old friend and partner in New York City.
Video.title: Brooklyn

Video.summary: While trying to help an elderly woman recover her lost life savings, Tony learns Rachel may have cancer.
Video.title: Letting Go

Video.summary: The malicious leader of paramilitary neo-Nazis take Hunter and McCall captive while planning their next attack
Video.title: Bad Company

Video.summary: Cheyenne convinces a reluctant Bobby to post bail and help prove the innocence of her unrequited love who has been arrested for the murder of his wife, Marily
Video.title: Once Burned, Twice Chey

Video.summary: Chris and Rita pose as an engaged couple and attend a sex therapy clinic.
Video.title: Soul Kiss

Video.summary: Chris is wounded when he's set up for a hit man.
Video.title: Look The Other Way

Video.summary: When Reno learns of the escape of a convicted killer, he heads for Chicago to protect the arresting officer, his father, Police Sergeant Doug Raines
Video.title: Windy City Blues

Video.summary: When a distinguished municipal judge awakes after an intimate evening to find his "date" murdered during the night, he must pay the price to the club owner who is willing to help him cover up the incident.
Video.title: Honor Bound

Video.summary: Rita goes undercover for the FBI to break up an international white slavery ring.
Video.title: Meat Market

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the drug overdose of a supposedly reformed addict.
Video.title: Giant Steps

Video.summary: When a love triangle involving a phony astrologist ends in murder, Chris and Rita investigate.
Video.title: Star Signs

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby travel to the tiny town in New Mexico, on the trail of a bail-jumper to find him being hunted down by a posse for murder.
Video.title: The Posse

Video.summary: Reno stumbles into a man-hunt for brothers wanted for armed robbery and the confrontation results in the shooting death of the local sheriff.
Video.title: Sheriff Reno

Video.summary: Bobby and a reluctant Reno head to San Francisco when Bobby is contacted by a Import/Export magnate to find alleged Industrial spy Rikki Yeager.
Video.title: Murderer's Row, Part 1

Video.summary: After Reno saves Rikki Yeager from a psychotic bounty hunter, his attempt to turn her over goes up in smoke when the plane sent for their transport explodes in an obvious ambush plot.
Video.title: Murderer's Row, Part 2

Video.summary: When Reno walks into a museum robbery in progress while meeting with Judge Sarah Jessup, both he and the judge are "introduced" to disillusioned Special Investigations cop, Carrick O'Quinn.
Video.title: Carrick O'Quinn

Video.summary: Reno's freedom appears within reach when he goes after his nemesis Lt. Dutch Dixon who is wanted for the murder of his own partner.
Video.title: Dutch On The Run

Video.summary: Rita and Lipschitz go undercover to investigate murders at a high school.
Video.title: Head 'N' Tail

Video.summary: Chris' college classmate is accused of murdering his unfaithful wife.
Video.title: Freudian Slip

Video.summary: Donovan's campaign for D.A. is caught up in a murder to cover corruption in city hall.
Video.title: The Last Campaign

Video.summary: Chris and Lipschitz investigate the death of a porn magazine magnate.
Video.title: The Deep End

Video.summary: A scheming stepmother seduces her husband's son in order to Inherit his fortune.
Video.title: Mother Love

Video.summary: While Rita is undercover with a new partner to catch a cop killer, Chris is stalked by an obsessed beauty who has a "If I can't have him, no one can" policy.
Video.title: Dark Heart
